title: Pirates Awakened
body:
# This mod is discontinued and wont recieve updates anymore



![Pirates awakened](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/942b5b6f6fbef8dc53d3e573929f02dc8d699614.png)

## Additions:  
Cannons: Shoot Cannonballs when fueled with a Cannonball and Gunpowder and Lit with a Torch  
Two sets of Pirate Armor: The Black Crusader armor and the Dark Pirate Armor along with the Skull mask  
Sextant: Gives you your world position without having to open F3 (and it looks cool)  
Dabloons: Pirate style Currency - made using Gold and Diamonds and can be crafted into Dabloon Stacks  
Shipwood: More durable Woodtype made by rightclicking any plank/log with a Tar Bottle. Comes in default and Black color  
Tar: Used to create shipwood. Made by blasting Coal  
Structures: A Hut, a small Cannontower, an upside down Shipwreck and a Camp  

Made for the MCreative SMP S4: Pirates
